parameters-en.SW1: Enables/disables Mode 1, which has the lowest level of effect intensity. Like the original, multiple modes can be enabled at once.
parameters-en.SW2: Enables/disables Mode 2, which has a medium level of effect intensity. Like the original, multiple modes can be enabled at once.
parameters-en.SW3: Enables/disables Mode 3, which has a higher level of effect intensity. Like the original, multiple modes can be enabled at once.
parameters-en.SW4: Enables/disables Mode 4, which has the highest level of effect intensity. Like the original, multiple modes can be enabled at once.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
